overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence through a futuristic urban waterfront district in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The player walks past parked futuristic vehicles in a wet courtyard, then proceeds along a wooden boardwalk beside a harbor, passing modern architecture and waterfront establishments under an overcast sky.

events.description: NPC in orange jacket begins walking away from the parking terminal toward the plaza
moving past the blue muscle car and approaching the black futuristic sedan

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the parking area, observing the parked vehicles and surroundings

notable_agents.action: character in orange and black jacket standing near parking terminal, then walking away toward the plaza

entered.detail: classic muscle car with metallic purple-blue paint and white racing stripes
sleek red sports car with aerodynamic design parked in the lot
futuristic parking meter terminal with orange accents and digital display
large illuminated screen displaying advertisements on the building facade
tall modern building with geometric architecture surrounding the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wet parking courtyard with futuristic vehicles including a distinctive blue muscle car and red sports car. An NPC in an orange jacket stands near a parking terminal before walking away. The camera moves slowly past the vehicles on the rain-slicked asphalt, with modern architecture visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza leading to waterfront commercial buildings

events.description: exiting the enclosed parking courtyard into the open waterfront plaza
turning toward the Delamain building entrance and waterfront boardwalk access

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza toward the modern waterfront commercial buildings

entered.detail: modern multi-story commercial building with glass facade and prominent signage
tall futuristic street lamps with distinctive red accent lighting
wooden tables and chairs arranged outside a waterfront cafe

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the parking area into an expansive open plaza with the Delamain building visible on the right. The wet asphalt reflects the gray overcast sky. Modern lamp posts and waterfront railings come into view as the camera approaches the boardwalk area, leaving the parked vehicles behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden waterfront boardwalk along the harbor

events.description: ascending ramp and transitioning from asphalt plaza to wooden boardwalk surface
continuing straight along the boardwalk with harbor water visible to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden boardwalk beside the harbor, passing outdoor seating and dock structures

entered.detail: wet wooden planks forming the elevated waterfront walkway with metal railings
calm water of the harbor reflecting the overcast sky and surrounding structures
wooden docks and piers extending into the harbor water

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the wooden boardwalk along the waterfront, with the harbor visible to the right and a tiered modern building to the left. The wet wooden planks reflect the diffuse light. The camera continues past dock structures and waterfront railings, maintaining a steady pace along the water's edge with the urban architecture lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked parking courtyard into an expansive waterfront plaza and along a harbor boardwalk. It begins by gliding past futuristic vehicles, including a blue muscle car and a red sports car, while an NPC in an orange jacket departs from a nearby parking terminal. As the camera leaves the parked cars behind, the scene opens into a wide plaza where the wet asphalt reflects a gray overcast sky and the Delamain building emerges on the right. The movement then shifts from the pavement toward the water's edge, passing modern lamp posts and railings before transitioning onto a wooden boardwalk. Finally, the camera maintains a steady pace along the wet planks, flanked by the open harbor to the right and tiered modern architecture to the left.
